reviews.review_title: A Hidden Gem More Should Play
reviews.review_description:
I love this game and I love that it is a fun and immersive way to learn something new.  Great choice of voice actors as well.  
I have one tiny thing that I would love to see change in the future.  Maybe an option to turn off the blink when you teleport.  It's super tiny and would add to the immersive gameplay even more.

We need more games like this.  It is a fun way to learn more about different places and the ecosystem around us.  I love the art style and it's a great way for new people to enjoy VR.  It runs really smoothly, which would encourage more newer people to VR. 

This is definitely a hidden gem.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your review and feedback! We're so happy to hear that you're enjoying Unearthed! 

We've passed on your feedback to the team about the blink teleport movement.

reviews.review_title: I love the art style and voice acting!
reviews.review_description: This is a really fun game with great voice acting and a beautiful art style. I love the first level, where you fly around on the beetle, and the capybaras are so cute! The hubs where you explore and scan stuff are really relaxing and chilled, and I love how you can learn interesting facts about the natural world, but it's not forced upon you.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We had so much fun making it. We're glad you're enjoying it too!

reviews.review_description: We are just starting the game, but after a few hours with it, we love it! Lots of fun with educational videos along the way. Definitely recommend for kids! And for adults, who doesn't love following along with Richard Ayoade as your guide!?

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, CataniaVR! We're really happy to hear that you're enjoying the game so much!

reviews.review_description:
Great experience for new VR users! It has some fantastic chemistry between the actors and the whole experience has a lot more depth than you might first expect.

All in all a fantastic learning experience with some really great mechanics.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing! We love to read reviews like this!

reviews.review_description: Loved this VR experience! Wish more games were like this. Learned things while having fun... can't beat that. Beautifully done! Hopefully there will be update with more lessons :-)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We're so happy to hear that you're enjoying Unearthed and learning new facts!

reviews.review_description:
Delightful game with voice over from Moss from the IT Crowd.
lin(k)tr(DOT)ee/accreed

Delete ( and )
Replace (DOT) with .

Please mark review as helpful
Short but fun experience and works well. Leave a nice message about protecting the planet.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! We're glad to hear you enjoyed it!

reviews.review_description: The voice acting is fantastic and the game is fun!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! We're so glad you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description:
Gameplay Review on my Youtube Channel
This is a well made Adventure Educational game i would say. You have to do different tasks in biodomes so could be with beetles, or pirahna's. While looking for the professor who is lost. You have a trust robot sidekick voiced by Moss from IT Crowd. 

You have to scan plants, trees and animals to gain further into the game so there is  that educational part of it, and even the first levl about beetles it tells you about polinisation of plants.

Great graphics and humour with a good voice cast. Apart from the teleport locomotion which cannot be changed i enjoyed my time with it.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for playing! We're glad you see the educational benefit. We had so much fun designing the gameplay around it. We're looking forward to watching your full review!

reviews.review_description: Love, love, love this gorgeous game! I'd spent ages looking for games that were suitable for my younger children (too young to play on Quest really but they like me to cast so they can watch and shout instructions at me); most were so boring, short or shallow that I had almost given up trying. Then I spotted UnEarthed and I'm so glad I did - we had such fun experiencing it together and learning as a family. Hazzi is the best - SO funny, he had us all giggling away (brilliant voice acting - took me way too long to work out who it was). The content is rich and varied and, despite being very educational (and not just your standard, typical and repetitive environment stuff - even I learnt a lot), it's all delivered in a way that means it's still really good fun! I especially enjoyed being the animals - a unique experience, for sure. My 10-yr old was able to play the game himself and my younger daughter was just as engaged joining in and learning from watching us. Oh and the lily scene!!! Sooooooooo awesome. Anyway, highly recommended - for all ages :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for your lovely review, EggyChan! We're really pleased to hear that you and your family are having such fun playing Unearthed!

reviews.review_description:
A journey through the natural world from some unique and pint-sized perspectives, with some wonderful and humorous voice acting along the way. 

The bow in particular is fun to use and I enjoyed learning new things at my own leisure.

A lot of care has been taken to make movement comfortable and it's great that you can move through the world at your own pace.

developer_response.body: This is so lovely to read! Thanks for leaving a review!

reviews.review_description: Sorry but found this a let down. It is not very long at all to finish. The graphics bit cartoony and blocky. If you’re getting for a youngster ,hope they enjoy a lot of reading about nature,as it contains a fair bit of it.   not much to do really at all ,though did enjoy the mushroom section. But all 6 sequences are very very short

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, slinkyrat! We're sorry you found the game too short but glad you enjoyed the mushroom section.

reviews.review_description:
This game is such a little hidden gem. Love the tounge and cheek humour! And whenever I have the wandering curious thought; ''can I do this?", "is this what I think it is?!", apparently I can! And YES it is!  

Had me laughing in the first ten mins and haven't stopped smiling since. Definitely worth a play!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much playing! We're glad you're enjoying Unearthed!

reviews.review_description: Voice acting is top notch, love the humor. The gameplay is surprisingly fun as well. This would definitely be 5 stars if it had smooth turning, it is a very basic feature that is strangely missing.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! We're really glad to hear that you're enjoying Unearthed. 

We've let the team know your feedback about smooth turning and will see if we can include an option for this in a future update.

reviews.review_title: Educational and fun for kids + 25% off
reviews.review_description:
This is geared more towards kids, it does a good job of teaching them about lots of nature species.  A bit simplistic for adults, but a nice experience.  It's certainly funny.  
If you want 25% off:
25off.miketunes. com

This game is great! I downloaded it on a whim because I saw it was recently released and I'm glad I did. I like how it takes you on a journey with a different animal on each level so I feel like i'm really out in the wild exploring from the perspectives of these animals and helping them on their journey around the environment.
 
So far it's a really gentle game with beautiful environments, nice VR mechanics (love the bow and arrow and the jaguar paws!!), and a really mysterious story because we need to find The Professor. The robots are really funny as well!

I think this game would appeal to a lot of people, definitely recommend trying it out!

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! We're really glad you're enjoying the bow & arrow and jaguar features!

reviews.review_title: Super cute 🫶🏻 just what I needed!
reviews.review_description:
Such a beautiful and sweet, nature adventure with no stress at all! 

Sometimes it’s nice to just enjoy a game without constantly feeling threatened. 

Perfect for all ages who want to learn  about nature and how important our world is, right down to the circle of life! 

Lovely messages and a beautiful environment to enjoy throughout! I enjoyed the drones humour too!🤩👌🫶🏻

25% off link in bio 🥳

I really want to love this game. Unfortunately, I don't always have a giant amount of space to VR in, and even in the intro level it places items I'm supposed to interact with well outside my boundary. I'm stuck on the first real level now, as whatever item (a journal) I'm supposed to pick up is not even visible.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear you're having a few issues playing Unearthed in your space. The opening section of the game should be fully playable within a 2x2m space, after which you'll be able to use teleport locomotion to move around. 

If you'd like any support with the issues you're encountering, please feel free to contact us on unearthed@factory42.uk and we'll do our best to assist you.

reviews.review_description: On the whole fun for a quick escape - I would have liked a smooth movement option and for the floor grid not to have appeared. Richard Ayowade and other actors were awesome - Nice work all in all for something a little different to return to from time to time

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We've passed on your feedback to the team about smooth movement and the floor grid.

reviews.review_description: This was fairly cute with a nice story and you definitely learn about the Amazon but I think it’s best suited for kids.  Very little actual gameplay and it was super glitchy in spots.  But for the price, as long as you aren’t expecting challenging gameplay I’d say it’s worth the price to explore. And the narrators were funny - except when they repeated themselves over and over and over (almost had to mute the game cos was driving me nuts)

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! We're sorry to hear you encountered glitches. It'd be great if you could give us some more details about these by emailing unearthed@factory42.uk
